title: Expired Metadata API key in Xano Request action
symptom: Users are unable to select an endpoint in the Xano Request workflow action due to an expired Metadata API key.
not_this_if: The issue is unrelated to API key expiration
root_cause: The Xano plugin requires a valid Metadata API key to function properly. When the key expires, it prevents users from accessing necessary endpoints, leading to selection issues in the workflow.
fix_steps: Generate a new Metadata API key from your Xano account
Update the Xano plugin in your WeWeb project with the new key
agent_instruction: Generate a new Metadata API key and update the Xano plugin with it.
